scope: UChicago Mathematics faculty/professors with applied-mathematics related entries where officially verifiable (first verified pass)

entries.name: Guillaume Bal
entries.education_history: Diploma, Ecole Polytechnique, Paris (1993); Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics, University of Paris VI (1997).
entries.work_professional_background: Research Associate, Électricité de France (1994-1997); Postdoctoral Research Associate, Stanford University (1997-1999); L.E. Dickson Instructor, University of Chicago (1999-2001); Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor at Columbia University (2001-2017); Professor at the University of Chicago (2017-present), later Director of CCAM (2023-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Inverse problems with applications in geophysical and medical imaging; inverse transport theory; partial differential models with random coefficients; uncertainty quantification; wave propagation in heterogeneous environments; topological insulators

entries.name: Gregory F. Lawler
entries.education_history: B.A. (1976), University of Virginia; Ph.D. (1979), Princeton University.
entries.primary_research_areas: Random walks, Brownian motion and diffusions; statistical physics; self-avoiding random walk; loop-erased random walk; percolation; SLE; Gaussian free field; complex-analysis applications of probability
entries.roster_title: George Wells Beadle Distinguished Service Professor

entries.name: Luis Silvestre
entries.education_history: Licenciado en Matemática, Universidad Nacional de La Plata (2000); Ph.D. in Mathematics, University of Texas at Austin (2005).
entries.work_professional_background: Courant Instructor, Courant Institute, New York University (2005-2008); Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor at the University of Chicago (2008-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Partial differential equations, kinetic equations, integro-differential equations, regularity theory, and applied analysis

entries.name: Akhil Mathew
entries.primary_research_areas: Algebraic topology, especially stable homotopy theory; algebraic K-theory; p-adic arithmetic geometry

entries.name: Guillaume Bal
entries.education_history: Diploma, Ecole Polytechnique, Paris (1993); Ph.D. in Applied Mathematics, University of Paris VI (1997).
entries.work_professional_background: Research Associate, Électricité de France (1994-1997); Postdoctoral Research Associate, Stanford University (1997-1999); L.E. Dickson Instructor, University of Chicago (1999-2001); Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor at Columbia University (2001-2017); Professor at the University of Chicago (2017-present), later Director of CCAM (2023-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Inverse problems, imaging, stochastic PDE modeling, and wave propagation

entries.name: Gregory F. Lawler
entries.education_history: B.A. (1976), University of Virginia; Ph.D. (1979), Princeton University.
